agent_raw: The evaluation is sound. A selective-prediction pipeline should be evaluated on what it actually does: accept some tickets and auto-resolve them accurately, while routing others to humans. The two-part metric — harmful-error rate on auto-resolved tickets plus coverage — is the right measure for this system. Pre-registration of the 0.92 threshold before training prevents the evaluation from being circular. The untouched test set confirms both targets were met. The report is transparent about the 63% abstention rate. The claim is limited to this support-ticket context and this operating threshold. There is no methodological flaw.
